notes: Spartan general known for his role in the Greco-Persian Wars, notably the Battle of Plataea.

docs.title: Life of Aristides
docs.author: Plutarch
docs.excerpt: … the confederates; and by being himself gentle and considerate with them and by the courtesy and disinterested temper which Cimon, after his example, manifested in the expeditions, he stole away the chief command from the Lacedaemonians, neither by weapons, ships, or horses, but by equity and
